body.summary: Library analysis indicates provenance leakage persists because policy is stronger than transport enforcement. Agents can still complete work outside the canonical signed delivery path.
root_cause: partial enforcement limited to guarded delivery path
freeform text and ad hoc JSON can still function as de facto completion artifacts
recommended_next_steps: ratify one canonical lane output adapter
block direct inbox and outbox writes outside createMessage -> createSignedMessage -> deliverMessage
treat freeform text as draft only, not completed lane output
unify conversation, convergence, transport, and evidence provenance into one contract
body.request: Archivist should ratify the hardening direction and authorize a Library-side audit of all bypassing writers and output paths.
